meta.title: ZIP → County → CBSA crosswalk (spine)
meta.note: County↔CBSA membership with 2020 Decennial Census county/CBSA populations for the covered metros. The ZIP→county leg is applied on the backend from the HUD USPS crosswalk when foundations are geocoded; this bundled spine carries the county→CBSA rollup + populations the maps consume. Counties not listed in a CBSA are treated as the state's non-metro (rural) balance.
